comments.text:
Add get_with_version/2 and put_if_version_matches/5 to ObjectStorage behaviour.

## API

- get_with_version(backend, key) -> {:ok, data, version_token} | error
- put_if_version_matches(backend, key, version_token, data, opts) -> :ok | {:error, :version_mismatch}

## Version Token Format

- LocalFilesystem: sha256:<content_hash>
- S3 (future): ETag from response headers  
- GCS (future): gen:<generation_number>

## Files

- lib/bedrock/object_storage.ex (add callbacks + API)
- lib/bedrock/object_storage/local_filesystem.ex (implement)
- test/bedrock/object_storage/local_filesystem_test.exs (tests)
comments.author: Jason Allum

title: Add conditional update support to ObjectStorage (version tokens)
